assertions.description: Source has U2 (74LCX07), J2 (DIN-5_180degree MIDI_IN connector), OC1 (optocoupler), MIDI_IN2 (MIDI out connector), D1 (1n4148), R9/R10/R11/R12 (resistors), C15 (15pF), C16 (0.1uF). Output reports total_components=11, ic=1, connector=2, optocoupler=1, resistor=4, capacitor=2, diode=1. All component types are correctly categorized. The 74LCX07 is a hex open-drain buffer used for 5V-to-3.3V level shifting on MIDI lines. 16 no_connects correctly counted. Power rails +3.3V and GND detected.

The rc_filters entry shows R10 (10k) and C15 (15pF) with input_net='+3.3V', output_net='MIDI_RX', ground_net='GND', cutoff=1.06 MHz. However R10 is the MIDI input current-limiting resistor, and C15 is an EMI suppression capacitor across the MIDI input. The input_net of '+3.3V' is incorrect — R10 pin 2 and C15 pin 1 are on the MIDI_RX net, while R10 pin 1 connects to the optocoupler anode network, not +3.3V. The '+3.3V' attribution is likely a misidentification of the pull-up rail on the optocoupler output side being conflated with the input side.
